last_safe_checkpoint.description: Amending the latest CLI-only cleanup commit to include stricter commit message checks.

bootstrap.goal: Remove the Web UI and keep dormammu operating as a CLI-only tool.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Resume from the next CLI-focused hardening task on top of the latest CLI-only cleanup commit.

items.text: Re-open planning for the product-direction change from optional Web UI to CLI-only operation
Capture the CLI-only design decisions and runtime deletion scope
Remove Web UI commands, runtime modules, frontend assets, and packaging dependencies
Refresh docs, roadmap, and `.dev` state so they describe a CLI-only tool
Validate the CLI-only slice and keep `.dev` state synchronized before completion

next_action: Continue the next CLI-focused hardening slice from the latest CLI-only cleanup commit.
notes: Resume from the next CLI-focused hardening slice unless a new priority overrides it.
The product direction now excludes Web UI and browser-served runtime paths.
Validation passed through targeted CLI/config tests and full unittest discovery.
Amending the latest CLI-only cleanup commit to include the strengthened commit message checks.

latest_commit.summary: Remove Web UI and tighten commit message checks
